items.how_used: 定义了符号如n, r, θ, c, m, d, (x_c,y_c,z_c), x(t), y(t), z(t), v(t), T, N_total等，用于后续建模。
items.source_excerpt: Symbol Definitions: n The number of drones on the circle of the Ferris wheel; r The radius of the Ferris wheel; θ The angle between the radius of the circle which that drone is on and the +y axis (Spinning clockwise); ...

items.how_used: 使用矩阵思想，通过将每个点的坐标替换为其在相同圆周运动路径上的前一个点的坐标来构建模型。
items.source_excerpt: Considering the space coordinate of every points and using the idea of matrix, we constructed the model based that on the thought of substituting every points own coordinate with its consecutive former one in the same circular motion path.

items.how_used: 将龙的身体建模为正弦函数sin(x)的形状，并创建运动模型使其平滑周期运动。
items.source_excerpt: We made the body of the dragon as the shape of sin(x), and the movement model was created, enabling the dragon to move smoothly and periodically during the animation.

items.how_used: 在论文中包含了示意图，展示三个显示（摩天轮、龙、笑脸）的无人机集群布局。
items.source_excerpt: Schematic diagram: Display 1: Ferris Wheel; Display 2: Dragon; Display 3: Smile face

items.how_used: 使用MATLAB编程对每个模型进行评估，计算所需无人机数量、发射区域和空域要求。
items.source_excerpt: After finishing all three models, our team gave out the evaluation for each of them with MATLAB programming.

items.how_used: 列出了5条假设，包括将图形视为二维、仰角45度、忽略气流干扰、平均飞行高度50米、安全距离1米，并给出了理由。
items.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: We treat the figures as two-dimensional patterns... Assumption 2: The angle of elevation for viewing the sky light displays is 45°... Assumption 3: For each drone in the figures, the air flow interference caused by neighboring drones can be neglected... Assumption 4: The average flying altitude of the aerial light show patterns is 50 meters... Assumption 5: The safety distance between the drones is 1 meter.

items.how_used: 论文结构遵循IMRaD格式：摘要、引言（Restatement）、假设、变量定义、建模、评估、结论、参考文献、附录。
items.source_excerpt: Catalogue: Abstract... 1. Restatement... 2. Assumption & Justification... 3. Definition of Variables... 4. Math Modeling... 5. The requirements for the 3-display light show... 6. Evaluation of the Model... 7. Conclusion... 8. Reference... 9. Appendix

items.how_used: 摘要总结了问题、方法、结果和结论，包括所需无人机数量、发射区域和空域尺寸。
items.source_excerpt: Abstract: ... we successfully developed a few comprehensive mathematical models to determine the number of drones required and model their initial location and the flight paths mathematically in both static and animate state. ... we determined to use up to 427 drones to create three sky displays. And the required launch area would take up 9m×9m, and the air space of 100m in length, 50m in width and 80m in height was required.
